## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] File is named in lowercase, hyphen-separated format (e.g. `my-article-title.md`)
- [ ] File includes the frontmatter metadata block at the top
- [ ] Article has all required sections: Overview, Key Concepts, Practical Application, Further Reading
- [ ] No promotional, affiliate, or vendor-marketing content
- [ ] All external links have been checked and are working
- [ ] Content is original or properly attributed (not plagiarised)
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
